description: Hired as a System Engineer (Digital) to deliver innovative technology solutions to clients.
Work on building and maintaining scalable web applications using modern tools and frameworks.
Focus on developing clean, efficient code while ensuring high performance and reliability.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver end-to-end solutions, from planning and design to deployment and support.
Passionate about continuous learning and committed to delivering excellence in every project.
Built a subscription management module across frontend, backend, and database layers.
Integrated Razorpay payments with error handling and transaction validation.
Implemented Twilio-based messaging and notification workflows.
Integrated SendGrid for transactional emails to 250+ active users.
Developed WebSocket-based real-time user tracking for organizations.
Built a 6-level RBAC system with customizable roles and permissions.
Centralized email delivery using Google, SendGrid, and AWS SES.
Integrated AWS SES, SNS, and webhooks for email status tracking.
